title: The Butterfiy's Assumption-Gown,
content:
The butterfiy's assumption-gown,
    In chrysoprase apartments hung,
        This afternoon put on.


    How condescending to descend,
    And be of buttercups the friend
        In a New England town!
meaning:
"The Butterfiy's Assumption-Gown," is a quintessential example of Emily Elizabeth Dickinson's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
